name: sox-recorder
title: Sox Recorder
description: Record multiple audio inputs from your macOS
author: danielchinye

commands.name: menu-bar-recording
commands.title: Recording (Menu Bar)
commands.subtitle: Start or stop recording
commands.description: Start or stop recording from the menu bar

tools.name: search-transcript
tools.title: Search Transcript
tools.description: Retrieve the transcript for a recording by filename, for example recording_2026-03-05.mp3.

ai.instructions: Use the search-transcript tool when the user asks about what was said in a recording or asks for a transcript. The tool expects a filename. Recordings created by this extension follow the filename pattern recording_YYYY-MM-DD.mp3, so if the user refers to a recording by date, convert that date into the matching filename before calling the tool.

evals.input: @sox-recorder what was discussed in the recording on 2026-03-05?

search-transcript.transcript: We discussed launch readiness, the onboarding checklist, and a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday.

evals.input: @sox-recorder show me the transcript for recording_2026-03-05.mp3

search-transcript.transcript: We discussed launch readiness, the onboarding checklist, and a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday.

evals.input: @sox-recorder what did we say in the March 5, 2026 recording?

search-transcript.transcript: We discussed launch readiness, the onboarding checklist, and a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday.

preferences.name: transcriptPrompt
preferences.title: Transcript Prompt
preferences.description: Prompt to use for transcribing and summarizing

preferences.name: fastTranscript
preferences.title: Fast Transcript
preferences.description: Use a faster, smaller model for transcription

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
